name: Hemper Table Lamp - 21.5 Inch Height - TBL4423 - Matte Black/- - Safavieh
description:
Introducing the Hemper table lamp, your new home essential that combines modern design with practical functionality. Standing at 21.5 inches, this lamp makes a statement while fitting seamlessly into any room. Its matte black finish adds a sleek touch of elegance, complementing a variety of decor styles from contemporary to minimalistic.

Crafted from durable resin, the Hemper lamp provides a stylish and sturdy lighting solution. Whether placed on a bedside table, a living room shelf, or an office desk, it offers the perfect blend of form and function. Its classic silhouette and understated design make it an ideal choice for those who appreciate subtle sophistication.

Enhance your space with the Hemper lamp's soft, inviting glow and elevate the ambiance of any room. Experience the perfect mix of style and practicality today.
